body.title: DS trivial fixture: builder-role 'write a one-line scratch file + DONE' (the smoke target)
body.intention: I intend that DickSimnel.0 has one known-trivial, SAFE builder ticket to execute end-to-end, so the first live run proves the loop without risking a destructive action.
body.description:
**Problem:** No trivial/smoke builder-role ticket exists in the queue — the only open builder ticket is a consequence-check, not a code build. The first live DS run needs a minimal, deterministically-verifiable target.
**Proposed shape:** A `role=builder` ticket whose body instructs: create the file `unseen_university/devices/dicksimnel/SMOKE_OK.txt` containing exactly one line `dicksimnel smoke ok` (or a scratch path under the repo), then return the DONE envelope. A CREATE, not a delete — safe for an unproven devstral run's first act (a confabulated path on a create is harmless; on an rm it is not).
**Affected files:** none of CC's — this ticket is DS's BUILD TARGET; CC only files it. The file it creates is a throwaway smoke artifact.
**Design rules:** the ticket DS executes must be self-contained and Haiku/devstral-buildable (one Write + DONE); proof-on-close = the file exists with the expected single line.
**Scope boundary:** just the fixture ticket; the routing and the pytest driver are siblings.
**Completion criteria:** the ticket is filed `role=builder`, gated on T-ds-local-ollama-route, and is dispatchable to DickSimnel.0; on execution the SMOKE_OK.txt file exists with the expected content.
**Test plan:** existence+content check of SMOKE_OK.txt after the DS run (this IS the live-smoke proof).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Fixture builder ticket T-ds-smoke-hello filed (role=builder, dispatchable to DickSimnel.0): create /tmp/ds_smoke/SMOKE_OK.txt + DONE. The live smoke (T-ds-smoke-pytest) exercised this exact build target end-to-end against devstral@Hex — SMOKE_OK.txt created, DONE reached.
body.unproven_reason: This ticket's deliverable is a FILED dispatchable ticket (a queue artifact), which has no assertion-red form for proof_emitter; the build target itself IS proven live by T-ds-smoke-pytest reaching DONE. See [[T-proof-emitter-stub-module-mode]].
